sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100543" key="sunh/nemos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνήνεμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n100543.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">exposed to the wind</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:110" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.110</biblScope> </bibl>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ς. ἐλπίδες</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">all unstable</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1414.tlg001:33" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heraclit.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">All.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">33</biblScope> </bibl> cod. (dub.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
